calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-01-2014 Vacated

Mtn To Compel Further Resposnes To Special Interoggs
Off Calendar Jun-04-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Lisa J. Espada, Esq. of the Law Offices of Lisa J. Espada, Tel. 415.504.6195, for defendant and moving party;
Charles Glauberman, Esq. of Hunt & Henriques, Tel. 408.677.5823, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: Both parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was argued. After hearing, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on DEFENDANT DANIEL SCHUTTE's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interogatories, with modification. Defendant Daniel Schutte's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Speical Interrogatories 1 - 6, and 10 -12 is granted as follows: 1. In response to special interrogatories 1, 4, 5 & 6, plaintiff's objections are overruled and plaintiff is ordered to provide defendant the identity, including names and contact information, of all persons known to defendant as called for by each interrogatory. 2. In response to special interrogatories 2 & 3, plaintiff's objections are overruled and plaintiff is ordered to provide defendant with identity of the documetns, including description or title of the document and the name and contact information of the custodian of the document. 3. In resposne to interrogaotries 10 & 11, plaintiff's objections are overruled and plaintiff will set with specificity the date which it contends the account was sent to defendant and the date of the last item on the account. 4. In response to interrogatory 12, plaintiff's objections are overruled and plaintiff is ordered to provide defendant with the identity of the documents, including description and the name and contact information of the custodian of the document. 5. All responses ordered in paragraphs 1 - 4 above will be delivered to defendant within thirty (30) days from the date of this order. 6. Monetary sanctions against PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC and its counsel Hunt and Henriques in the amount of $1500 is awarded to defendant's counsel payable within ten (10) days of this order. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
